# Audit Log Actions
*Reference list of all audit log action types that can be tracked in Wiz, including user actions and system events.*

Category: reference

This page lists all possible action values that can be used when filtering Audit Log entries.

- AddSupportTicketContext
- AiAssistantSendMessage
- ApproveCopyResourceForensicsSettingsChanges
- AssociateServiceTicket

- ClearUIUserPreferences
